746 GG0170P3_PCKNG_UP_OBJ_END_CD GG0170P3_PCKNG_UP_OBJ_END_CD GG0170P3 Picking Up Object End Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to bend/stoop from a standing position to pick up a small object, such as a spoon, from the floor at the end
